offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed financial reporting causes cash flow gaps. We generate monthly financial reports instead of manual spreadsheets or basic accounting software.
problem: Etsy sellers need to generate accurate monthly financial reports to manage their cash flow effectively.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers seeking help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums where Etsy sellers share tools
try_it: Let users try financial report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Short demo video of manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
